case_title: UNIVERSE MEDIA, LTD VS ONLY THE BRAVE, LLC

docket_entries.description: CERTIFIED MAIL RECEIPT RETURNED SIGNED SENT TO LANE NISHIKAWA MANAGING MEMBER FOR ONLY THE BRAVE, LLC, DEFENDANT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF UNIVERSE MEDIA, LTD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ONLY THE BRAVE, LLC $5,100.00 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,160.00, THE JUDGMENT REPRESENTS DAMAGES AWARDED TO PLAINTIFF IN LIEU OF ANY PARTICIPATION INTEREST IN THE SUBJECT FILM PROJECT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY UNIVERSE MEDIA, LTD AS TO DEFENDANT ONLY THE BRAVE, LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-13-2007 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-13-2007 - JUDGMENT. BOTH PARTIES PRESENT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT, CLERK FANNY RAYRAY, NOT REPORTED. (506).
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-03-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
